playbook.intent: Sharper positioning: top 5 competitors re-audited, pricing & feature deltas captured, 1 positioning tweak shipped, kill-list updated for non-differentiating roadmap items.
playbook.scope: Sharper positioning: top 5 competitors re-audited, pricing & feature deltas captured, 1 positioning tweak shipped, kill-list updated for non-differentiating roadmap items.

success-criteria.criterion: Final stage decision-gate is met and committed in writing
Every stage produces its named outputs
Cycle closes only when a written commitment exists for the next step

stage.name: Re-list the field

tasks.task: Pull the current top-5 from search + social + customer mentions
Drop anyone irrelevant; add new entrants
Lock the canonical list for this month

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when exactly 5 competitors are named.

stage.name: Feature + pricing audit
stage.intent: Capture deltas in a single sheet.

tasks.task: Walk each competitors pricing page
Capture feature deltas vs your product
Note any new positioning angle

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when every competitor row is filled with a date.

stage.name: Positioning tweak
stage.intent: Ship one small positioning change before next month.

tasks.task: Pick one delta worth responding to
Update headline / pricing card / one section
Run the change past 3 outsider readers

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when one positioning change actually deploys.

stage.name: Kill non-differentiators
stage.intent: Cut roadmap items that everyone already has.

tasks.task: Review backlog for table-stakes items not differentiating
Mark them kill / accept / defer
Update the kill log

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when at least one backlog item is killed.

stage.name: Positioning diff log
stage.intent: Keep a record of how positioning evolves.

tasks.task: Write a one-paragraph diff vs last month
Tag the strongest competitor and why
Set reminder for next monthly scan

stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes when the diff log entry is dated and committed.

stage.name: Brand-storytelling refresh
stage.intent: Keep the one-liner sharper than competitors.

tasks.task: Re-write your one-liner once per quarter
Test it against the top competitors claim
Roll the winner into landing + bios

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when one-liner survives the outsider test.

stage.name: Topical-authority signal
stage.intent: Spot SEO gaps the competitors leave.

tasks.task: Pull the gap keywords competitors rank for that you do not
Pick one cluster to attack next month
Queue 1 content brief

stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes when one content brief is filed.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content monthly-competitor-landscape-scan --format md, agent: faion get-content monthly-competitor-landscape-scan --format context, json: faion get-content monthly-competitor-landscape-scan --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial v2 draft generated from F-059..063 backlog}]
